fix: case-insensitive login lookup + remove CSP script-src-attr block

with mixed-case usernames (pre-lowercase fix) can authenticate.
Registration duplicate check also uses collation to prevent case-variant
username conflicts.

Removed helmet's default script-src-attr: 'none' directive that was
blocking MetaMask's injected content script inline handlers.

commit.message:
Fix invisible nav text by using pure white for blend mode

The masthead uses mix-blend-mode: difference, but the nav text
was --color-paper (#f5f2ed) instead of pure #fff. On light
backgrounds the near-white produced almost no contrast. Pure
white ensures solid black via difference blending on any light bg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Isolate dev DB from production — prevent cross-environment config leaks

Dev Open WebUI was sharing the production PostgreSQL via the external
openwebui-db_default network. PersistentConfig values (embedding model,
content extraction engine, etc.) set in the admin UI affected both
environments, and .env overrides only applied on first boot.

Changes:
- Add webui-db-dev PostgreSQL service (port 5434) with dedicated volume
- Rename container open-webui → open-webui-dev, use open-webui-dev-data volume
- Route all dev services through openwebui-dev internal network
- Set DATABASE_URL/PGVECTOR_DB_URL in docker-compose.yml environment
  (pointing to webui-db-dev, not .env)
- Add scripts/clone-db-to-dev.sh: dumps production DB → restores into
  dev DB, then patches RAG/embedding config to match .env values
- Update README: architecture diagram, quick start with DB clone step,
  dev DB management section, networking docs
- Update .env.example: remove DATABASE_URL (now in compose), add DEV_DB_PORT

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add content-engine skill — content atomization and multi-platform repurposing

Content Engine skill that atomizes source content into typed insight units
(stat, story, framework, contrarian take, how-to, etc.) and reassembles
them into platform-native adaptations across 12+ platforms.

Features:
- Two modes: Content Repurposing (transform existing content) and Content Calendar (plan weekly/monthly content)
- Voice calibration system to maintain founder authenticity
- Bidirectional flow: long→short decomposition AND short→long expansion
- Drip scheduling with platform-specific timing
- Anti-AI-slop guardrails
- Korean content adaptation (not translation)
- 7 reference files: atomization, social platforms, long-form, short video, communities, Korean adaptation, voice & calendar

commit.message:
Log full command line for tracked processes, fix self-measurement

The "bash sustained high CPU" alert was anomalous-mon measuring itself
(ps shows the script's own process as "bash"). Fixed by excluding own
PID and parent PID via awk instead of grep pipes (also fixes the
"grep: write error: Broken pipe" noise).

Now captures full command line (ps args field) in state and logs, so
alerts show e.g. "claude --dangerously-skip-permissions" instead of
just "bash" or "claude".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Integrate solutions into UMAP with YAML-source aggregation

Major updates to support solutions as first-class entities in UMAP visualization:

**YAML-Source Aggregator:**
- Created aggregator_yaml_source.py with YAML-first ingredient extraction
- Implements 4-tier extraction priority:
  1. chebi_term.id from enriched YAML
  2. term.id if already CHEBI/FOODON
  3. Name→CHEBI fallback mapping
  4. KG solution→CHEBI fallback
- Tracks extraction statistics for transparency

**Solution YAML Enrichment:**
- Enriched 4,757 solution files with CHEBI terms (99.6% coverage)
- Added 34,828 chebi_term fields to composition items
- Built fast compound→CHEBI mapping (1,103 mappings, 90.7% coverage)
- Extracted 38,660 solution→CHEBI edges from KG-Microbe
- Match breakdown: 51.9% KG fallback, 28.9% exact match, 19.2% synonym match

**UMAP Integration:**
- Updated umap_generator.py to use MediaVectorAggregatorYAML
- Implemented get_direct_embeddings method in YAML-source aggregator
- Regenerated UMAP visualization with 4,757 solutions (33.3% of derived embeddings)
- Added entity_type facet (medium vs solution)

**Results:**
- Derived embeddings: 14,274 total (9,517 media + 4,757 solutions)
- Direct embeddings: 3,327 media
- Ingredient extraction sources:
  - yaml_chebi_term: 34,828 (16.3%) - from our enrichment
  - yaml_term_chebi: 124,218 (58.2%) - pre-existing IDs
  - kg_fallback: 18,487 (8.7%)
  - not_found: 34,993 (16.4%)
  - name_fallback: 787 (0.4%)

All solutions now appear in UMAP with proper entity_type classification.

commit.message:
feat(blueprints): add outcome logging to knowledge graph and memory (Phase 8.4)

Feed completed blueprint run outcomes back into Cognee graph and pgvector
memory for institutional learning. Outcomes are formatted as narrative text,
queued in Redis, and ingested asynchronously via OutcomeGraphPoller (30s
interval, leader election, batch size 10). Dual storage: semantic memories
for agent similarity search + Cognee ECL pipeline for structured entity
extraction. Fire-and-forget pattern ensures failures never crash the
blueprint pipeline.

Alison instantly. DB lookup + booking setup now runs as an
asyncio.create_task() in the background; verification prompt
is queued after setup completes (or a fallback on failure).

commit.message:
Rewrite login flow to redirect immediately without waiting for state

Previous approach: signIn() updated auth session, then relied on
onAuthStateChange to set user/profile in context, then Login.tsx
useEffect watched for user && profile to redirect. If profile was
null (missing row, RLS issue), redirect never fired.

New approach: signIn() now fetches the profile directly and returns
both user and profile to the caller. Login.tsx navigates immediately
using the returned data instead of watching context state.

Also fixes ProtectedRoute to show an error page when profile is null
instead of redirecting to /login (which caused infinite redirect loop).

commit.message:
Benchmark Report 007: advanced scenarios (roman-numerals, string-utils, cron-engine)

Three Tier 2-3 missions all reach mission-complete with recommended profile:
- A1 roman-numerals: 6 iterations, 9/9 acceptance criteria
- A3 string-utils: 3 iterations (fastest), 7/7 acceptance criteria
- A6 cron-engine: 8 iterations, 7/8 acceptance criteria

Key findings: all missions produce working code on first transform,
behaviour test instability is the primary convergence bottleneck,
no dedicated test files created in any scenario.

Also adds ITERATION_BENCHMARKS_ADVANCED.md scenario matrix.

commit.message:
fix: 추모 모달 스크롤 최종 수정 — 모든 간섭 제거

이전 시도 전부 실패한 이유:
- useBodyScrollLock → body position:fixed → 모든 스크롤 죽음
- touchmove 핸들러 → 모달 내부 스크롤까지 간섭
- max-h + overflow-y-auto → 컨텐츠가 max-h보다 작으면 무의미

이번 접근 — 간섭 제로:
- useBodyScrollLock 안 씀
- body 스타일 안 건드림
- touchmove 핸들러 안 씀
- backdrop: fixed inset-0 overflow-y-auto (스크롤 컨테이너)
- 래퍼: min-h-full flex items-center justify-center py-8 px-4
- 모달: 자연 높이 (max-h 안 씀), 화면보다 크면 backdrop 스크롤

refactor: 重构代码结构并更新组织名称

主要更改：
1. 将 5547 行的 handlers.go 拆分为 17 个模块文件
   - node_handlers.go - 节点管理
   - client_handlers.go - 客户端管理
   - agent_handlers.go - Agent 接口
   - user_handlers.go - 用户管理
   - tunnel_handlers.go - 隧道转发
   - port_forward_handlers.go - 端口转发
   - proxy_chain_handlers.go - 代理链
   - node_group_handlers.go - 节点组
   - notification_handlers.go - 通知告警
   - system_handlers.go - 系统管理
   - plan_handlers.go - 套餐管理
   - tag_handlers.go - 标签管理
   - rule_handlers.go - 规则管理
   - clone_handlers.go - 克隆操作
   - config_version_handlers.go - 配置版本
   - traffic_handlers.go - 流量历史
   - site_config_handlers.go - 网站配置

2. 更新组织名称从 AliceNetworks 到 supernaga
   - 更新 go.mod 模块路径
   - 更新所有导入路径
   - 更新配置文件和脚本

3. 添加代码质量工具
   - 添加 .golangci.yml 配置
   - 添加重构文档

优化效果：
- 代码可维护性大幅提升
- 模块职责清晰，易于定位问题
- 减少团队协作时的合并冲突
- 提高新功能开发效率

fix: iOS保存をユーザージェスチャー起点の2段階方式に変更

になりshareが失敗していた。

修正: blob準備完了後に「保存する」ボタンを表示し、そのタップで
navigator.share()を呼ぶことで、常に新鮮なジェスチャー内で実行。

commit.message:
Fix horizontal pill snap, reduce blue size, bump Brownian rotation

- Renderer: when segments overlap (distance² < 0.01), keep the sprite's
  previous rotation instead of snapping to 0 (horizontal). This was
  causing large segments to lock horizontal during crowding.
- Reduce blue length range from [1.0, 3.0] to [0.8, 2.0] — less
  visually dominant and reduces max blue HP from 2800 to 1200+base.
- Bump Brownian rotation from 0.015 to 0.02 rad/tick for better
  anti-locking during crowded conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix hook dedup filter and increase SessionStart timeout

The dedup filter checked for 'llm_memory' in command paths, but actual
paths use '/memory/lib/hooks/', causing hooks to triple on every install.
Also increased SessionStart timeout from 5s to 15s to prevent timeouts
from GitHub API checks and transcript processing.
